payment_instructions: Please send ACH payment to account 123-456-999. For remittance advice email remittance@fluvosoft.example.org with the invoice number and reference details.
terms: Net 21. Late payment charges may apply. This note is intentionally very long to verify multi-line wrapping behavior and avoid overflow across page boundaries in print/PDF output.
